The '''Khuiumin Survivors''' were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] band associated with [[Leonia Tavira]]'s [[Invids]].

==Origin==
The Survivors were all that remained of the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Once eight thousand individuals strong, the Eyttyrmin Batiiv pirates were utterly wiped out by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Battle of Khuiumin]]. Less than three hundred pirates, and one [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] (the ''[[Backstab]]'') under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jacob Nive]], survived the Imperial assault. Swearing vengeance against the Empire, the remnants of the band began calling themselves the Khuiumin Survivors and Nive became the new leader by default.

==During the Emperor's Reign==
During the height of the Empire, the Survivors became [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], only taking jobs where they could kill Imperials.

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], they participated in the [[Battle of Derilyn|destruction]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Brazen]]''.<ref name="OE">[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]</ref>

After [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Death/Legends|death]], the Survivors once again returned to their pirating ways.

==With the Invids==
When [[Leonia Tavira]] and her ''[[Invidious]]'' began pirating, a number of pirate organizations joined her. One such organization was the Survivors. As Invids, the Survivors provided Tavira with some of her best [[Clutch (fighter)|Tri-fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], and were well respected within the organization as its most disciplined division. The Survivors returned to the old Eyttyrmin Batiiv [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv stronghold|base]] on [[Courkrus]], and the other Invid groups followed suit. The Survivors tended to gather in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] called [[The Crash (cantina)|the Crash]], which was decorated with debris from [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] shot down by Survivor pilots, and from starfighter crashes which Survivor pilots had escaped.

During their [[Time/Legends|time]] with the Invids, the Survivors were joined by [[Jenos Idanian]], who was actually the undercover [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]. Idanian quickly rose through the ranks of the group to become leader of the elite [[Bolt Squadron (Khuiumin Survivors)|Bolt Squadron]] and Nive's second in command. Eventually, Corran revealed himself to Nive as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], though he used another of his aliases, Keiran Halcyon. He and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] convinced Nive to turn against Tavira and the Invids, and the Survivors struck out on their own. The Survivors [[Battle of Susevfi|led]] [[Booster Terrik]] and the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' to Tavira's base at [[Susevfi]], and Corran suspected that they would begin operating from that [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Aftermath==
Despite Nive's growing dissatisfaction with the Survivors' acts of thievery and murder, the group apparently returned once again to piracy. The Survivors were eventually completely wiped out by the pirate hunting [[Starship/Legends|starship]], ''[[Naritus]]''. They were a well-organized and exceptionally skilled pirate band, but ultimately they could not survive in [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] society.
